item.label: Fix error handling in validation.py:42
item.summary: Replace generic exception with specific types

body: Inconsistent error handling in validation.py at line 42. The function catches generic Exception without specific type, violating standard-0008 (Python Implementation). Replace with specific exception types based on expected failure modes (e.g., ValidationError, JSONDecodeError for JSON parsing, ValueError for validation failures). Add type hints for function parameters. Follow pattern from state_machine.py:28-43 which uses structured error classes with suggestions. Provide detailed error handling documentation including recovery guidance. Ensure all caught exceptions are documented with their specific handling logic and any cleanup operations performed.
